contexts.summary: Audited TODOs vs code: rust-cli already removed (split done, cargo check clean) but ci.yml/release.yml/build.ps1/sgconfig.yml still ref it (broken). Added TODO.md P8 (post-split remediation) + P9 (robustness) and refreshed agents.TODO.md checkpoint/test inventory. Next: land CI/build fixes + in-flight migration, then deploy parallel fleet.

Synced local repo with origin/main (FF 427d2ab->356acdc, 7 commits); stash/pull/pop preserved uncommitted WIP; resolved 3 merge conflicts favoring upstream; workspace compiles clean. WIP intentionally uncommitted.
Earlier structural refactor context (crate split planning).
